summary: §17 should be added to the agent body as the normative caller persistence protocol because the body already owns §12-§15 artifact, invocation, state, and convergence contracts.
Reference-only placement would conflict with ADR-001's lightweight-source-of-truth framing; references should hold expanded details, not replace the agent body protocol.
Round-2 amended plan explicitly calls for agent body §13 update plus new §17 with helper snippet, exit codes, resulting layout, and §0 invariant preservation.
§17 must enumerate all four caller patterns because command-only wiring was falsified by round-2 evidence; helper must remain standalone-invokable.
Depth-1 persistence is parent-owned. The LEAF council returns the plan; the dispatching parent invokes the helper after return.
The current agent body is 689 LOC, so a short §17 remains under ADR-001's approximate 750 LOC spill threshold; long four-caller examples should move to a reference if they would bloat the body.
Do not put §17 only in a reference file. It would make the post-dispatch persistence rule invisible to direct callers who load only the agent body.
